changelog: ✨ Improved noise system to properly build and decay over time
✨ Fixed issue where noise bar could reach 100% without triggering NPC or police reactions
✨ Added separate noise thresholds for NPC wake-up and police alerts
✨ NPCs now correctly wake up, stop sleeping animations, and react aggressively to loud noise
✨ Improved synchronization between Lua noise logic and NUI progress bar
✨ Prevented repeated police alerts by adding proper reaction flags
✨ Minor performance optimizations in client-side threads
